evals.prompt: I built an AI writing tool and want to launch it on Open Launch to get backlinks and early users. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Submission checklist with tier recommendation, launch timing, and promotion strategy

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Covers listing preparation: name, description, screenshots, URL

assertions.name: tier_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends Premium ($12) for guaranteed DR65 backlink

assertions.name: timing
assertions.description: Notes all launches at 8:00 AM UTC and advises coordinating network

assertions.name: multi_platform
assertions.description: Suggests pairing with other launch directories for broader reach

evals.prompt: Should I pay for Open Launch Premium or just do the free submission?
evals.expected_output: Cost-benefit analysis explaining conditional free backlink vs guaranteed paid backlink

assertions.name: free_conditions
assertions.description: Explains free backlink requires Top 3 daily ranking AND badge display

assertions.name: premium_value
assertions.description: Notes $12 for DR65 dofollow is the cheapest guaranteed backlink in the ecosystem

assertions.name: roi_calculation
assertions.description: Compares $12 cost to $200+ for equivalent DR65 backlink through outreach

assertions.name: clear_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends Premium for anyone who values the backlink, free only if budget is truly zero

evals.prompt: Should I launch on Open Launch or Product Hunt first?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of both platforms with recommendation to use Open Launch first

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares PH (DR91, highest traffic, 24-hour window) vs Open Launch (DR65, daily rankings, lower stakes)

assertions.name: sequenced_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends Open Launch first to refine messaging before Product Hunt

assertions.name: pricing_difference
assertions.description: Notes Open Launch Premium at $12 vs PH free-only model

assertions.name: not_exclusive
assertions.description: Clarifies they're not mutually exclusive — use both in sequence
